forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 km/h before turning north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h before dawn then turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the north, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Possible small hail in the south in the evening. Winds westerly 35 to 50 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Possible small hail in the south in the morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:20am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h increasing to 45 km/h before turning southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the afternoon, then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Hawker, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly in the middle of the day then tending northwest to northeasterly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 25 to 30.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Hawker, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Hawker in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h before dawn then tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 33.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower east of Ceduna, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h before dawn then increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly during the afternoon then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon then tending northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 28 to 37.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Coober Pedy in the morning. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 37.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeast to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. High chance of showers south of Yunta, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwesterly in the middle of the day then tending northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 28 to 37.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:10am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. High chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Yunta in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 19 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 32 to 38.
Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 34.
Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 25.
